deviceid.description: ID of device that tracked the data. To retrieve information about this device, refer to : User v2 - Getdevice.

hash_deviceid.description: ID of device that tracked the data. To retrieve information about this device, refer to : User v2 - Getdevice.

brand.description: Specifies if data comes from Withings (device or mobile application tracker) or an external way (Value is 1 for Withings and 18 for external)

is_tracker.description: Is true if data was tracked by a Withings tracker (such as Pulse, Go and Watches) otherwise data was tracked by a mobile application or an external way

modified.description: The timestamp of the last modification.

steps.description: Number of steps. *(Use 'data_fields' to request this data.)*

distance.description: Distance travelled (in meters). *(Use 'data_fields' to request this data.)*

elevation.description: Number of floors climbed. *(Use 'data_fields' to request this data.)*

soft.description: Duration of soft activities (in seconds). *(Use 'data_fields' to request this data.)*

moderate.description: Duration of moderate activities (in seconds). *(Use 'data_fields' to request this data.)*

intense.description: Duration of intense activities (in seconds). *(Use 'data_fields' to request this data.)*

active.description: Sum of intense and moderate activity durations (in seconds). *(Use 'data_fields' to request this data.)*

calories.description: Active calories burned (in Kcal). Calculated by mixing fine granularity calories estimation, workouts estimated calories and calories manually set by the user. *(Use 'data_fields' to request this data.)*

totalcalories.description: Total calories burned (in Kcal). Obtained by adding active calories (see ```calories```) and passive calories.

hr_average.description: Average heart rate. (beats per minute).*(Use 'data_fields' to request this data.)*

hr_min.description: Minimal heart rate (beats per minute). *(Use 'data_fields' to request this data.)*

hr_max.description: Maximal heart rate (beats per minute).. *(Use 'data_fields' to request this data.)*

hr_zone_0.description: Duration in seconds when heart rate was in a light zone (cf. Glossary). *(Use 'data_fields' to request this data.)*

hr_zone_1.description: Duration in seconds when heart rate was in a moderate zone (cf. Glossary). *(Use 'data_fields' to request this data.)*

hr_zone_2.description: Duration in seconds when heart rate was in an intense zone (cf. Glossary). *(Use 'data_fields' to request this data.)*

hr_zone_3.description: Duration in seconds when heart rate was in maximal zone (cf. Glossary). *(Use 'data_fields' to request this data.)*
